subtasks.description: Query license data grouped by publisher, calculating total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses per publisher

plan.cost_rationale: Single straightforward SQL aggregation query. No joins across multiple tables with complex logic, no reconciliation of multiple sources, no policy evaluation needed. A standard GROUP BY with SUM, AVG, and COUNT functions is within the scope of a simple query that can be handled reliably by a small-tier model. Minimal task decomposition because this is a single-source aggregation request.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
